vitals.aid_stations: grab-and-go snacks en-route, lunch venue mid-day, finish line food

course_description.overview: Sunrise-to-sunset ultra-endurance road ride across southern Norway from Bergen on the west coast to Kristiansand on the south coast, featuring mountains, coastal vistas, and fjord landscapes.

key_segments.name: West Coast Start
key_segments.description: Depart Bergen at sunrise along coastal roads with initial climbs.

key_segments.name: Mountain Traverse
key_segments.description: Cross inland mountains and valleys with significant elevation gain.

key_segments.name: Southern Approach
key_segments.description: Descend to Kristiansand for sunset finish amid coastal terrain.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Challenging non-competitive ultra-distance ride with 3300m elevation over 450km, demanding strong endurance, navigation, and pacing to finish before sunset.

logistics.getting_there: Fly to Bergen Airport (BGO); arrange return from Kristiansand (KRS); self-arrange travel or use optional coach transfers as in other routes.
logistics.accommodation: Self-arranged; bag drop available from 04:00 on ride day.
logistics.registration_details: Solo £79, Team £210 (3 riders); includes GPX files, training plans, tracking, snacks, mechanics, medal; pre-register for priority.
logistics.bike_logistics: Own bike; support vehicles allowed; mechanic at key stops; bag van for luggage.
logistics.local_considerations: Mid-summer longest day; variable weather; self-supported navigation; sign-in via SMS at start, lunch, finish.

final_verdict.one_liner: Epic sunrise-to-sunset coast-to-coast challenge through Norway's stunning fjords and mountains.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Ultra-endurance road cyclists seeking adventure, navigation challenges, and longest-day glory.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for the notable scenery, community, and personal achievement.
pro_tips: Join relay team if solo feels daunting.
Pack for variable Norwegian summer weather.
